hero.subtitle: I'm a Product Designer passionate about bringing clarity to complex and ambiguous problems. I thrive in fast-paced, collaborative environments where I can turn uncertainty into structure, build scalable systems from the ground up, and create frameworks that help teams move faster and make better decisions.

about_mini.cta_text: Want to know more about my journey, design principles, and what drives me every day?

featured_work.heading: Three projects I'm proud to have led

contact.body: I'm always open to talk about design, product, or a great opportunity. Send me a message.

about_page.contact_body: I'm open to new opportunities, collaborations, and conversations about design and product.
